name: claude
description: Server-side agent on Claude Managed Agents — hosted sessions with a sandboxed toolset, human approvals, custom tools, MCP, skills, memory, and rubric-graded outcomes — behind the Labs chat surface.
postNotes: Next: bun install · put ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env.local · `bun run agent:setup` creates the agent, environment, and memory store, uploads the skill, and prints the IDs to add to .env.local · bun dev. Managed Agents is BETA (managed-agents-2026-04-01, pinned via the SDK) — the living reference is https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/managed-agents/overview; verify model ids and event shapes there before writing new agent code.
